infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mittens needs camera access to analyze your meals and fridge contents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pick food photos from your gallery for nutrition analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mittens uses your location to compute travel times and know when to remind you to leave.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Mittens uses your location to track where you are, send departure alarms, and infer what you are doing.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Mittens uses motion data to detect if you are walking, biking, or driving.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mittens uses the microphone for voice input.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Mittens uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Mittens uses Bluetooth to communicate with the Mittens pendant.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Mittens needs to connect to the Pendant via WiFi to receive photos and audio recordings.

plugins.cameraPermission: Mittens needs camera access to analyze your meals.

plugins.photosPermission: Pick food photos for nutrition analysis.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Mittens uses your location to track where you are, compute travel times, and know when to remind you to leave.

plugins.microphonePermission: Mittens uses the microphone for voice input.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Mittens uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice.
